name: Tony Stark
text: Inventor — Setup: Discard 1 card from your hand → search your deck for a [[TECH]] upgrade and add it to your hand. Action: Reduce the cost of the next upgrade played this round by 1. (Limit once per round.)

flavor: "Hi. I'm Iron Man. Want to cut to the surrender?"
name: Iron Man
text: Reactor Cores — Action: Spend X printed [energy] resources → place X reactor counters here.

name: Repulsor Barrage
text: Hero Action (attack): Deal 3 damage to an enemy. This attack gains ranged. You may remove 1 reactor counter from Iron Man to deal 3 additional damage to that enemy. If Iron Man has the [[AERIAL]] trait, you may divide damage among enemies as you choose.

name: Tactical Overview
text: Hero Action (thwart): Remove 3 threat from a scheme. You may remove 1 reactor counter from Iron Man to remove 3 additional threat from that scheme. If Iron Man has the [[AERIAL]] trait, you may divide threat removed from among schemes as you choose.

flavor:
"Taking her for a test flight. Let's see how she flies."
-Iron Man
name: Take Flight
text: Hero Action: Ready Iron Man. Iron Man gains the [[AERIAL]] trait until the end of the round. If Iron Man already has [[AERIAL]], place 1 reactor counter on Iron Man.

flavor: "Do you know, my financial team told me I'm down to my last hundred million dollars today?" -Tony Stark
name: Stark Tower
text: Resource: Exhaust Stark Tower → generate a [star] resource for any player.

flavor: "We've got some tinkering to do." —Tony Stark
name: Tony's Workshop
text: Alter-Ego Action: Exhaust Tony's Workshop → heal 1 damage from Tony Stark and place 1 reactor counter on him.

name: Energy Shield
text: Iron Man gets +1 DEF. Hero Interrupt: When Iron Man would take any amount of damage, remove 1 reactor counter from him → prevent up to 2 of that damage.

name: Mark Iva Repulsors
text: Hero Interrupt: When Iron Man makes a basic attack, remove 1 reactor counter from him → that attack deals 2 additional damage and gains ranged.

name: Repulsor Core One
text: Hero Action: Exhaust Repulsor Core One → place 1 reactor counter on Iron Man. Hero Action: Remove 1 reactor counter from Iron Man and exhaust Repulsor Core One → ready Iron Man.

flavor: "Not fast enough. Let's try full power."
name: Rocket Boots
text: Iron Man gains the [[AERIAL]] trait. Hero Interrupt: When you use one of Iron Man's basic powers, exhaust Rocket Boots → Iron Man gets +1 to that power for this use.

flavor: "200% power. Give it everything we've got."
name: Save The Day
text: Hero Interrupt: When a treachery is revealed, discard Save The Day and remove 1 reactor counter from Iron Man → cancel all of that treachery's effects and discard it.

flavor: "What are we dealing with? Onscreen." —Iron Man
name: Tactical Interface
text: Hero Interrupt: When Iron Man makes a basic thwart, remove 1 reactor counter from him → that thwart removes 2 additional threat and ignores the patrol keyword.
